name: Free Fantasy City RPG
description:
Free RPG city and surroundings for you to explore, play as you want. NSFW Possible!

After a long travel on ship, you arrive in the lands of Estalia and the port city of Perpetal.

The city is a hot pot of different types of people of all sizes and races coming together to live as peaceful as possible. And it is up to you to find your way and advanture in this place. Enjoy.

Fair warning, there are futanari characters in this one. If you don't like that, make sure to tell the bot to turn them all into females in the chat memory.

P.s. The land is NOT related to Warhammer. It is based of a RP sim in the game Second Life.

Please remember to use Chat Memory since it could get too much for the bot to remember everything. If the bot describes things, that don't make sense, correct him or generate its answer new.
creator: KSFemboy
